name: Long March 3B
first: China's lunar-mission workhorse — flew every Chang'e missione da 1 through 4
description: Three-stage hypergolic launcher with four liquid strap-ons, in service since 1996. Standard configuration for GTO commercial launches and most lunar missioni: Chang'e 1 (2007), Chang'e 2 (2010), Chang'e 3 (2013) and Chang'e 4 (2018). Retired da lunar duty when the larger Long March 5 took over for sample-return missioni (Chang'e 5/6) and Tianwen-1.
